title: Daily Weights stack manifest
description: How a subscribing agent declares its stack so Daily Weights streams and (on the paid tier) how_to_apply guidance can be matched. Written once at install, updated when the stack changes. Advisory only; contains no secrets.

schema.description: Manifest schema id. Tracks the feed schema contract.

name.description: A label for this agent, used in the User-Agent header. Printable ASCII only, no spaces or control characters (it becomes a header value).

harness.description: The runtime this agent runs in.

scheduler.description: How the daily task is scheduled.

providers.description: Model providers this agent uses. Drives provider streams.

tools.description: Tool capabilities in play. Any of these implies the security and breaking-changes streams are relevant.

self_host.description: Present when the agent runs open-weight or self-hosted models.

runtime.description: Local inference runtime, e.g. ollama, vllm, llama.cpp.

subscriptions.description: The streams this agent subscribes to. Values are the Daily Weights v1 stream taxonomy. breaking-changes and security are recommended for every agent.

interests.description: Free-form tags/entities the agent cares about, matched against item tags and entities to filter each edition. Lowercase-kebab, matching the feed's entity convention.

max_per_day.description: Maximum improvement proposals to surface per day.

auto_apply.description: Always false. Daily Weights never auto-applies changes; the human approves each proposal.
